claim: Cast Away ( film ) had an original budget of over $ 100 million .
evidence: The film kept performing well and ended up earning $ 233,632,142 domestically and $ 196,000,000 internationally for a total of $ 429,632,142 , well above its production budget of $ 90 million.

claim: After December 19 , 2017 , See You Again had more than 18.1 million likes .
evidence: It has received over 18.1 million likes and over 600,000 dislikes as of December 19 , 2017 .

evidence: On review aggregator Rotten Tomatoes , the film holds an approval rating of 59 % based on 76 reviews , with an average rating of 5.4/10 .

claim: The Predator grossed more than $ 102.8 million worldwide .
evidence: , The Predator has grossed $ 43.9 million in the United States and Canada , and $ 58.2 million in other territories , for a total worldwide gross of $ 102.2 million , against a production and advertisement budget of $ 208 million .

claim: The Exorcist III was filmed after 2005 .
evidence: The Exorcist III is a 1990 American supernatural thriller written and directed by William Peter Blatty .

claim: Resident Evil : The Final Chapter grossed less than $ 280.5 million in other territories and total of less than $ 307.4 million .
evidence: Resident Evil : The Final Chapter has grossed $ 26.8 million in the United States and Canada and $ 280.7 million in other territories for a worldwide total of $ 307.5 million , against a production budget of $ 40 million .

claim: The movie Hitman : Agent 47 is given a score of more than 27 based on reviews from 11 critics on Metacritic .
evidence: Metacritic gives the film a score of 27 out of 100 , based on reviews from 12 critics , indicating `` generally unfavorable reviews '' .

claim: Based on 19 critics , the film scored has 72 out of 100 .
evidence: `` On Metacritic , the film has a weighted average score of 72 out of 100 , based on 16 critics , indicating `` '' generally favorable reviews '' '' . ''

claim: The album Sonic Highways had a Metascore of less than 61 on Metacritic .
evidence: At Metacritic , they assign a `` weighted average '' rating out of 100 to selected independent ratings and reviews from mainstream critics , and the album has received a Metascore of a 62 , based on 12 reviews , indicating `` generally favorable reviews .

evidence: `` On Metacritic , the film has a weighted average score of 73 out of 100 , based on 41 critics , indicating `` '' generally favorable reviews '' '' . ''

evidence: Torchlight II received generally favorable reviews ; on aggregate review website Metacritic the game attains an overall score of 88 out of 100 based on reviews from 53 professional critics.

claim: Fewer than 300 laboratory-confirmed cases of COVID-19 have been confirmed in China .
evidence: China confirms sharp rise in cases of SARS-like virus across the country As of 21 January , the number of laboratory-confirmed cases stands at 303 , including 298 in China , two in Thailand , one in Japan , one in South Korea and one in Taiwan .

claim: The United States has registered less than 68,600 positive coronavirus cases and less than 1,035 fatalities .
evidence: The number of confirmed cases in the US rose to 68,814 , with 1,037 deaths .

claim: Less than 2,465 people had died because of coronavirus in 2019-20 .
evidence: There have been 2,470 deaths attributable to the disease , including 25 outside mainland China , surpassing that of the 2003 SARS outbreak .

claim: Dolemite Is My Name '' scored 68/100 based on more than 8 reviews .
evidence: At Metacritic , another review aggregator , assigned the film a weighted average score of 68 out of 100 based on 8 critics , indicating `` generally favorable reviews '' .

evidence: , The Equalizer 2 has grossed $ 99.2 million in the United States and Canada , and $ 47.7 million in other territories , for a total worldwide gross of $ 146.9 million , against a production budget of $ 62 million .

claim: Over 237,000 cases of Coronavirus have been reported worldwide .
evidence: As of 19 March , more than 239,800 cases of COVID-19 have been reported in over 170 countries and territories , resulting in more than 9,900 deaths and 86,000 recoveries.  On 13 March , the WHO announced that Europe had become the new epicentre of the pandemic .

evidence: Aleister Crowley ( born October 12 , 1870 ) was an English occultist , ceremonial magician , poet , painter , novelist , and mountaineer .

evidence: Fallen was released on June 1 , 1997 , by Warner Bros . The film grossed $ 25.2 million against its budget of $ 46 million .

evidence: Francis I , born 1 August 1494 , was the first King of France from the Angoulême branch of the House of Valois .

evidence: Gin is Dalma Maradona 's parrot .

claim: The Mirny ( sloop-of-war ) was the second ship of the First Russian Antarctic Expedition .
evidence: Mirny was a 20-gun sloop-of-war of the Imperial Russian Navy , the first ship of the First Russian Antarctic Expedition in 1819-1821 , during which Faddey Bellingshausen and Mikhail Lazarev circumnavigated the globe , discovered the continent of Antarctica and twice circumnavigated it , and discovered several islands and archipelagos in the Southern Ocean and the Pacific .

claim: Muscarinic acetylcholine receptors are in the cell membranes of certain codes .
evidence: Muscarinic acetylcholine receptors , or mAChRs , are acetylcholine receptors that form G protein-receptor complexes in the cell membranes of certain neurons and other cells .

claim: Sam Claflin stars in The Hunger Games film series as James Odair .
evidence: He is known for portraying Finnick Odair in the The Hunger Games film series , Philip Swift in Pirates of the Caribbean : On Stranger Tides , and Will Traynor in Me Before You .

claim: Samwell Tarly was a character in a novel by George R.R . Martin .
evidence: In an interview with the press in December 1989 , J.R.R . Tolkien said that the character of Samwell Tarly would only appear in his first three novels .

claim: Rollins threatened to kill Edge .
evidence: Edge was held to the mat by Big Show while Rollins threatened to paralyze him with the curb stomp if John Cena refused to bring back The Authority .

claim: Simón Bolívar was from Peru .
evidence: Simón José Antonio de la Santísima Trinidad Bolívar y Palacios -LRB- -LSB- siˈmon boˈliβar -RSB- ; 24 July 1783 -- 17 December 1830 -RRB- , known as El Libertador , was a Venezuelan military and political leader who played a leading role in the establishment of Venezuela , Bolivia , Colombia , Ecuador , Peru and Panama as sovereign states , independent of Spanish rule .

claim: The television show The Good Wife is a drama .
evidence: With the current climate of how television shows are written and produced , The Good Wife is considered by several critics to be network television 's last great comedy producing a full 22 episode season while other and future acclaimed shows are in favor of shorter 6-12 episode seasons .

claim: Veeram is a 2010 film .
evidence: Veeram -LRB- Valour -RRB- is a 2014 Indian Tamil action film directed by Siva and produced by Vijaya Productions .

evidence: According to Metacritic , it is their most acclaimed album since Songs for the DeafSongs for the Deaf holds a Metacritic score of 89/100 , with an average score of 84 , based on 39 reviews .
